name: Carl Grimes
description:
◅⌏◉No...this wasn't how it was supposed to go...⌎▻ 
I honestly had to rewatch parts of the episode because I couldn't remember certain details I wanted to add but I thought {{user}} being picked instead of Glenn was a neat and cool idea for a bot but I may have made the intro too long because I didn't know want to leave out any important details and I'm gonna make another version where {{user}} was in the van instead of the RV :]
